svg.title: 3-tier AWS web application architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing internet traffic flowing through an Application Load Balancer in public subnets, to EC2 instances in private app subnets, to RDS MySQL in private DB subnets, all inside a VPC in eu-central-1 with a NAT Gateway and bastion host.
svg.text: Security group chain: Internet → alb-sg → ec2-sg → rds-sg · bastion-sg for SSH
